mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rag_outbox_event ( topic, message_key, event_type, idempotency_key, payload_json, status, attempt, next_attempt_at ) VALUES ( #{topic}, #{messageKey}, #{eventType}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{payloadJson}, COALESCE(#{status}, 'NEW'), COALESCE(#{attempt}, 0), COALESCE(#{nextAttemptAt}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ) ON CONFLICT (topic, idempotency_key) DO NOTHING
mapper.update: UPDATE rag_outbox_event SET status = 'PUBLISHING', locked_by = #{lockedBy}, lease_until = #{leaseUntil}, attempt = attempt + 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND ( status IN ('NEW', 'FAILED') OR (status = 'PUBLISHING' AND lease_until <= CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) )
UPDATE rag_outbox_event SET status = 'PUBLISHED', published_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, lease_until = NULL, locked_by = NULL, error_message = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE rag_outbox_event SET status = 'FAILED', error_message = #{errorMessage}, next_attempt_at = #{nextAttemptAt}, lease_until = NULL, locked_by = NULL, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
